archetype_reasoning: User explicitly requested a cyberpunk, futuristic, and elite gaming organization theme with a dark black background and neon purple, electric blue, and crimson red accents. This maps perfectly to Archetype 7 for esports and gaming communities.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
scales.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase

typography.custom_instructions: Headings must use Unbounded for a wide, aggressive, elite gamer look. All body text, data tags, and labels must use JetBrains Mono to reinforce the 'Dark_Net' cyberpunk/hacker clan theme.

layout.spacing_system: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8 to p-16 for main sections. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

grids.marketing: MODE A: 'Tetris' Grid (asymmetric, tension-filled) for Home and About pages. Use col-span-full for hero elements.
grids.dashboard: MODE B: 'Control Room' Grid for Admin Dashboard and Member Profiles. Dense, data-heavy, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4.

surfaces.marketing_cards: Retro-Futurism 'Terminal' Look. Deep black background, 1px solid border in neon colors (e.g., border-[#00E5FF]/50), and subtle drop-shadow glows.
surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#0D0D14), 1px subtle border (#1A1A2A), sharp corners or max rounded-sm.
surfaces.glass: Optical Clarity Glass. bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px border-white/10 for sticky headers and navigation.

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Smooth fade-ins and staggered upward reveals for lists and grids.
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Interactive text MUST have explicit hover colors. Buttons must have a border pulse or inner glow effect on hover. Example: hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/10 hover:border-[#00E5FF] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.5)].
motion_and_interactions.glow_effects: Use CSS drop-shadow for neon text and box-shadow for glowing containers. Example: shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(176,38,255,0.4)].

buttons.primary: Sharp edges (rounded-none), bg-[#FF003C], text-white, uppercase, tracking-wider, font-heading. Hover: bg-[#FF003C] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,0,60,0.6)].
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px solid border-[#00E5FF], text-[#00E5FF], uppercase, tracking-wider. Hover: bg-[#00E5FF]/10 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)].

components.navigation: Sticky glass header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60). Navigation links must be visible on desktop. Include 'Join Dark_Net' CTA.
components.badges: Tiny, uppercase, wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]), border 1px solid, text-xs. For player roles (Tank, Roam, etc.), use distinct neon border colors.
components.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for general UI. For gaming specific, if needed, import from 'react-icons/fa6'.

image_urls.description: Vibrant urban alley with neon signs for Dark_Net home hero banner.
High-tech gaming setup with PCs and RGB lighting for About page.
Young man with game controller against neon backdrop. Use for Leader/MVP profile.
Gamer portrait in neon-lit studio. Use for Co-leader/Member profile.
Modern gaming setup with monitor and headset in neon environment.

media.hero_overlay: MANDATORY: bg-black/60 to bg-black/80 to ensure neon text remains highly readable over busy cyberpunk backgrounds.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='join-clan-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Set up Tailwind config with custom colors (neon_blue: #00E5FF, neon_purple: #B026FF, neon_red: #FF003C) and fonts (Unbounded for headings, JetBrains Mono for body). 2. Build the marketing pages (Home, About, Join Us) using pure HTML+Tailwind with Framer Motion for neon 'Tracing Beam' effects and staggered text reveals. 3. Build the Dashboard/Login using customized Shadcn components (strip borders, apply dark mode terminal styling). 4. Use provided Pexels images; NEVER use placeholder text for images. 5. Ensure APCA contrast ratios—neon text against true black backgrounds. 6. Integrate 'data-testid' on all buttons and form inputs.
